title: 修复临时仓库 smoke 的实际基线参数

sources.reason: The failing temporary repository smoke command still omits its local base argument.
The installed no-active check-ai branch requires an explicit PR base.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The remote failure is isolated to one remaining smoke command.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The temporary repository smoke command passes AI_BASE_COMMIT="$base" to make check-ai.
The existing check-ai-pr command continues to use the same temporary repository base.
The complete local quality and governance gates pass.
guidelines: Keep CI commands explicit about the repository whose baseline they consume.
Do not weaken or remove the installed template's PR ownership gate.
Keep the change limited to the remaining temporary-repository smoke command.

intent.problem: N26 changed the workflow_dispatch check-ai call, but the installer smoke block has a separate make check-ai invocation that still runs without its temporary repository base.
constraints: Use the temporary repository's initial commit as the PR baseline.
intent.rationale: Passing the saved local base at the actual failing call makes the installed template smoke path complete its own PR gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: temporary repository check-ai uses local base
evidence: The installer smoke command passes AI_BASE_COMMIT="$base".
The temporary repository subshell still unsets inherited AI_BASE_COMMIT.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continued remediation of remote CI blockers.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
